style.layout: 1600 px wide canvases, short noun-phrase labels, no long equations in diagrams
style.plots: Axes, points, curves, residuals, and update paths use each figure's Plot coordinate transform.

figures.data-as-matrix.svg: Student sample vector to dataset matrix
figures.sampling-modeling.svg: Population distribution to sample-based model distribution
figures.modeling-types.svg: Generative distribution fitting and discriminative conditional prediction
figures.linear-regression-loss.svg: Candidate regression lines, residual aggregation, and loss curve
figures.loss-mle.svg: Normal error with MSE and Laplace error with MAE
figures.optimization-backprop.svg: Gradient descent path and backpropagation graph
